title: Default Reporting Dashboard  to a Single Layer of Filters

posts.author: webercas (Carl Weber)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

There are currently three levels of filters that affect reports by default—the dashboard filters, the filters within the settings of a widget, and the filters you see when clicking on the filter icon within the widget. When creating a widget (and after connecting the board[s]) the only filters that affect the results should the be ones within the icon. The others should be completely open (not affect results.) Additionally, results from ALL groups within the connected boards should automatically be displayed in the results unless a user wants to exclude certain groups within the same list of filters (accessed via the filter icon.)

What are you trying to achieve

A more simple and foolproof way to build an accurate reporting dashboard.
